text:
Content skills are easy to scatter. This repo turns them into an installable system.

Social Media Skills for AI Agents is a public collection of Claude skills for social media workflows across voice building, newsletter writing, LinkedIn, graphics, short-form video, YouTube, https://t.co/RFFUaOnfWi
name: Dan Kornas

text:
🚀 Claude skills for almost any task!

2-min way to find one:

1. Name task in 1 sentence
2. Run /skills
3. Check https://t.co/fwPOAvnr0m or awesome-claude-code GitHub
4. Install to ~/.claude/skills/
5. No match? Create text file

Stop reinventing!

Which one first? 👇 https://t.co/y4ZnafwCj5
name: Anand Butani
